items.name: Unlucky Launcher
items.description: Shoot bad luck at your competitors by launching broken mirrors, umbrellas, and ladders at them! Upon impact, they trip onto the ground. There is a 30% chance they will temporarily be cursed with bad luck!  If they become unlucky they will suffer one of the following effects: They'll either be tripped nonstop, have a blurry screen, or have their walk speed revered so if they're walking forward, they are actually working backwards!
